name: ♇ Pluto
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Transformation, regeneration, destruction, shadow, Thought, freedom, clarity, inspiration, Flow, intuition, receptivity, emotion, Will, energy, transformation, illumination, Stability, foundation, endurance, materiality, Integration, unity field, consciousness
flowText: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows. ELEMENTS 🌬 Air — Full Correspondences

items.label: Deities/Angels
items.value: Hades · Shiva · Ereshkigal · Azrael · Hermes · Thoth · Shu · Archangel Raphael 💨 Air is the song of freedom — the invisible bridge between spirit and matter. · Yemaya · Poseidon · Tiamat · Archangel Gabriel 🌊 Water is the mirror of the soul — the depth that dissolves and renews. · Ra · Agni · Michael 🔥 Fire is the sovereign will — the spark that shapes the world. · Gaia · Demeter · Geb · Archangel Uriel 🌱 Earth is the vessel of endurance — the ground of being that bears all forms. · Sophia · Metatron ✨ Spirit is the crown and root of all elements — the clarity that binds them as one.
